title: Principal Investment Banker at ET Money

jsonLd.title: Principal Investment Banker at ET Money
jsonLd.description:
We at ET Money are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Raipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About ET Money:
ET Money is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ET Money!
